taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Full Stack Engineer
core_skills: Full Stack Programming, Backend Development, API Development, Modern Web Frontend Development, Quantitative Analysis
skill_match_scores: Full Stack Programming:0.0, Backend Development:1.0, API Development:1.0, Modern Web Frontend Development:1.0, Quantitative Analysis:1.0
must_have_quals: Strong programming skills with the ability to work across the full stack (backend, APIs, and modern web frontends), Self-motivated and comfortable taking ownership of ambiguous, high-impact projects end to end, Solid quantitative skills and a strong understanding of experimentation, metrics, and data analysis, Experience making data-driven decisions and measuring impact (A/B testing, feature flags, cohort analysis, and ad-hoc analysis), A passion for shipping high-quality products that move key growth metrics and delight users, 4+ years of industry experience in software engineering, preferably with exposure to growth, product, or experimentation-heavy environments
core_responsibilities: Design, build, and scale new 0→1 growth products and features across web and mobile, Work closely with Product, Design, and Data to define hypotheses, ship experiments, and iterate quickly based on results, Launch new features, experiments, campaigns, and partnerships in a fast-moving environment, balancing speed with quality, Build and evolve core growth infrastructure such as experimentation frameworks, notification systems, attribution pipelines, and growth-oriented APIs, Instrument, monitor, and analyze performance metrics and user feedback to identify opportunities for activation, retention, and monetization improvements, Craft delightful, data-proven user journeys that showcase the power of Perplexity while driving measurable business impact
job_summary: Perplexity is seeking experienced Full Stack Engineers to help revolutionize the way people search, learn, and get things done online. In this role, you'll translate cutting-edge AI advances into product experiences that drive activation, engagement, and revenue across millions of users.
